posts.text:
Today I will speak with Sardar Pashaei , fmr Iranian National Wrestling Champion, defected from Iran -  about the regime’s execution of this 19 year old rising wrestling star.


Masih Alinejad 🏳️ (@AlinejadMasih)

His name is Saleh Mohammadi, 19 years old wrestler. He was hanged today in Iran for the crime of protesting in last January and demanding💔

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/AlinejadMasih/status/2034575091363631346#m

I interviewed President Trump by phone. He doubled down on his anger at NATO and said all we need is “numbers” in the Strait to open it, Iran has nothing left.  Also, when asked if Japan gave any assurance of military support given that 90 percent of their oil comes from
 the Strait, the President say they have Constitutional restraints but would be there for us if we needed them, saying “Japan is better ally than NATO.” More to come on The Story. 3 pm and on The Five tonight.

President Trump to Japanese PM on the importance of the element of surprise: remember Pearl Harbor?

Video
A great man.  God bless Lou Holtz.  He inspired so many, was a blessing to Notre Dame and America!  foxnews.com/sports/legendary…

Thank you my brave, brave friend. Praying for a bright future for Iran!


Masih Alinejad 🏳️ (@AlinejadMasih)

Why did I say “I love you” to @marthamaccallum on air?
In 2014, when I launched a campaign against forced hijab in Iran and in the west was told “it’s your culture,” she gave Iranian wonder a voice. Loyalty matters.
My reaction to the death of Khamenei👇

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/AlinejadMasih/status/2028135085174624398#m
'So proud to be American': Hughes reflects on game-winner | NBC Olympics nbcolympics.com/videos/so-pr…
